title: OpenClinXR Business Plan: Source-Disciplined Variant
citation: User-provided OpenClinXR business plan variant. Accessed locally on 2026-05-02.
permitted_uses: Internal planning context for business model, evidence discipline, GTM, risk register, and roadmap assumptions.
Source-ledger seed material requiring external verification before external use.
claims_supported: The plan frames OpenClinXR as open-core plus hosted enterprise, validation network, and scenario marketplace.
The plan recommends a UME OSCE/EPA communication and diagnostic reasoning beachhead with formative assessment posture.
